| `UtilityNetworkAssociations.visibleElementsStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsStylePicker` property | [`hideStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsStylePicker`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-utility-network-associations/#hideStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsStylePicker) | 4.32 |
| `UtilityNetworkAssociations.visibleElementsStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsWidthInput` property | [`hideStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsWidthInput`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-utility-network-associations/#hideStructuralAttachmentAssociationsSettingsWidthInput) | 4.32 |

### Charts components breaking changes [charts components breaking changes permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#charts-components-breaking-changes)

- Properties on the [`<arcgis-chart>`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/components/arcgis-chart/) and [`<arcgis-charts-action-bar>`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/components/arcgis-charts-action-bar/) components now no longer reflect to DOM attributes.
- Unsupported properties and methods have been removed from the heat chart model:
  - `setAssignToSecondValueAxis()`
  - `stackedType`
- The [`WebChartCalendarDatePartsBinning`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/spec/web-chart/#WebChartCalendarDatePartsBinning) interface now has an additional required parameter `type` which impacts the usage of heat chart model’s [`xTemporalBinning`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#xTemporalBinning) and [`yTemporalBinning`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#yTemporalBinning) properties.







```
heatChartModel.xTemporalBinning = { type: "calendarDateParts", unit: "monthOfYear" };
```


### Coding components breaking changes [coding components breaking changes permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#coding-components-breaking-changes)

- The `getScript()` method has been removed from the [Arcade Editor](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/coding-components/components/arcgis-arcade-editor/) component. Instead, use the `script` attribute/property.
- The `getTestResult()` method has been removed from the [Arcade Editor](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/coding-components/components/arcgis-arcade-editor/) component. Test results are no longer exposed via this component API.

## Bug fixes and enhancements [bug fixes and enhancements permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#bug-fixes-and-enhancements)

- BUG-000105331: Resolved an issue where SimpleMarkerSymbol point graphic where not visible when positioned behind a transparent polygon graphic.
- BUG-000146922: Fixed an issue with [printing](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/print/) without a legend includes the background and legend title.
- BUG-000171108: Fixed an issue that prevented saving a [WebMap](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/WebMap/) when its [spatialReference](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/webmap/InitialViewProperties/#spatialReference) differed from the basemap’s [spatialReference](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/Basemap/#spatialReference).
- BUG-000173701: Fixed an issue where rendering large features in client-side [FeatureLayers](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/FeatureLayer/#source) resulted in poor performance.
- BUG-000174729: Fixed an issue where the [Shadow Cast component](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-shadow-cast/) displays shadows for zero time range in “Area above threshold” visualization.
- BUG-000176561: Fixed an issue where a dashed line [CIMSymbol](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/symbols/CIMSymbol/) was not rendering correctly if the `dashTemplate` had an odd number of values.
- BUG-000176880: Fixed the loading order of the [IntegratedMeshLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/IntegratedMeshLayer/) when its elevation differs from terrain elevation.
- BUG-000178607: Fixed an issue where [VectorTileLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/VectorTileLayer/) did not return results from [hitTest](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/views/MapView/#hitTest) when the `allow-overlapping` and `ignore-placement` layout styles were set to true for icon and text layers.
- BUG-000178993: Fixed an issue with some [MapImageLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/MapImageLayer/) visibility not updating until there was movement in the map.
- BUG-000179403: Fixed an issue when [printing](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/print/) a map with a GCS projection, the printout scale was different from the set scale.
- BUG-000179696: Fixed an issue when [printing](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/print/) a map with a GCS projection, adjusting the DPI value can affect the preview size.
- BUG-000181304: Fixed an issue in the [LayerList component](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-layer-list/) where legends for nested [sublayers](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/MapImageLayer/#sublayers) were not displaying correctly.
- BUG-000181339: Fixed an issue with the [Area Measurement 2D](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-area-measurement-2d/) component where it did not expose any activation event or state change.
- BUG-000181685: Fixed an issue where network requests for image services were not being sent at high zoom levels.
- BUG-000181712: Fixed and issue where popups/hittest didn’t work in specific local scenes.
- BUG-000181749: Fixed an issue that prevented saving a [WebScene](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/WebScene/) with a WMTS basemap layer belonging to a Presentation [Slide](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/webscene/Slide/).
- BUG-000181813: Fixed an issue where the [`Config.apiKey`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/config/#Config) was being used to request a FeatureLayer’s data when the layer was configured with its own API key.
- BUG-000182193: Fixed an issue when enabling geometry editing in the [Editor](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-editor/) canceled the active selection operation. This did not occur in attribute-only mode.
- BUG-000182829: Fixed an issue where [MapView.hitTest()](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/views/MapView/#hitTest) returned inaccurate results for line features in [VectorTileLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/VectorTileLayer/).
- BUG-000182732: Fixed an issue with the [Directions](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-directions/) component display when placed inside an [Expand](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-expand/) component on some mobile devices.
- BUG-000182788: Fixed an issue where the [Expand](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-expand/) component’s close button would become inaccessible on some mobile devices.
- [Esri Community - 1680182](https://community.esri.com/t5/arcgis-javascript-maps-sdk-questions/coordinate-conversion-component-setting/m-p/1680182/highlight/true#M88094): Fixed an issue where the [Coordinate Conversion](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-coordinate-conversion/) component’s display can become truncated.
- Fixed a issue with [print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/print/) filtering the sublayers based on the entered export scale.
- Fixed a memory leak in the [geodeticAreaOperator](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/geometry/operators/geodeticAreaOperator/).
- Fixed an issue in the [Legend component](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-legend/) where the `basemapLegendVisible` property was not working as expected.
- Fixed an issue in the [Locate component](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-locate/) where the `goToOverride` function was not being returned.
- Fixed an issue in the [Video Player component](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-video-player/) where the “Settings” string was not being localized.
- Fixed an issue with the [integrateOperator](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/geometry/operators/integrateOperator/) to allow for the returning of null values that indicate when geometries were removed, e.g. slivers and collapsed close vertices. The use case is to match the number of input geometries with the same number of output values (null or geometry). This will allow users to determine which vertices got removed as a result of the operation.
- Fixed an issue with the focus order for Map components. The focus will now go to the [Map](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-map/), [Scene](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-scene/), [Link Chart](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-link-chart/), or [Video](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-video/) first before focusing on any slotted components.
- ENH-000169527: Enhanced [polygon labeling](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/support/LabelClass/#labelPlacement) by better auto-repositioning the label when the polygon centroid is not in view.
- ENH-000173303: Enhanced the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component to allow users to select the units for the scalebar.
- ENH-000179216: Enhanced the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component to have a parameter that allows for disabling access to the advanced options.
- ENH-000181991: Added support for [locate\_settings](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/support/RouteParameters/#locateSettings) in [RouteParameters](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/rest/support/RouteParameters/).
- Enhanced the [projectOperator](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/geometry/operators/projectOperator/) to apply a linear Z unit conversion when projecting Z-aware geometries (when needed and supported).
- To allow users to easily set their own styling on Map components, we’ve removed the default padding when a component is not slotted in the [Map](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-map/), [Scene](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-scene/), [Link Chart](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-link-chart/), or [Video](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-video/) components.
- Added the [`double-tap-drag`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/views/View/#event-double-tap-drag) and [`vertical-two-finger-drag`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/views/View/#event-vertical-two-finger-drag) view events to provide more control over view navigation.
- Enhanced the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component by adding support for a configurable property to allow Author be auto-populated by the current signed-in user.
- Enhanced the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component to support [Dynamic legend items](https://pro.arcgis.com/en/pro-app/latest/help/layouts/work-with-legend-items.htm#ESRI_SECTION1_2A6847768842437497B5F1AB7B74F528)(requires 11.4 print service).
- Enhanced the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component to support printing tables with a supported layout template.
- Enhanced the [Directions](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-directions/) component with the ability to add and edit Waypoints.
- Added the `colorMode` property to [CIMSymbolAnimationColor](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/symbols/cim/types/#CIMSymbolAnimationColor) to provide control over how the animation color combines with symbol layer colors.
- Added the [`keepUpright`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/symbols/cim/types/#CIMMarkerStrokePlacement-keepUpright) property to [CIMMarkerStrokePlacement](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/symbols/cim/types/#CIMMarkerStrokePlacement) to allow markers to stay upright when angled to the line.
- Added properties to the [DictionaryRenderer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/renderers/DictionaryRenderer/) to support getting information about the style properties, such as the dictionary name, configuration properties, symbol fields, and more.

### Charts components fixes and enhancements [charts components fixes and enhancements permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#charts-components-fixes-and-enhancements)

- Hide empty rows and columns via the [`hideEmptyRowsAndColumns`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#hideEmptyRowsAndColumns) property from the heat chart model.
- Added support for legend positioning via the [`legendPosition`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#legendPosition) property and legend title customization via the [`legendTitleText`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#legendTitleText) and [`legendTitleSymbol`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#legendTitleSymbol) properties from the heat chart model.
- Added support for including leap day, this is `false` by default and can be enabled via the [`includeLeapDay`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#includeLeapDay) property from the heat chart model.
- Added support for coded domains and subtypes on the heat chart leveraging one or multiple category axes.
- Added support for sorting x and y axes orders via the [`setXAxisSortOrder`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#setXAxisSortOrder) and [`setYAxisSortOrder`](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/charts-components/model/heat-chart-model/heat-chart-model/#setYAxisSortOrder) properties from the heat chart model.

### Patch fixes [patch fixes permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#patch-fixes)

#### 5.0.10 (03/06/2026) [5010 03062026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#5010-03062026)

**Core API**:

- [Esri community - 1687933](https://community.esri.com/t5/arcgis-javascript-maps-sdk-questions/flashing-flow-renderer-after-version-5-0/m-p/1687933): Fixed an issue with FlowRenderer where it would unexpectedly flash in areas with no data.
- Fixed an issue where a CIMSymbol with CIMGeometricEffectDashes was not rendering consistently in some layers when snapshot mode was used.
- Fixed an issue where specific 3D tiles weren’t fully renderering.
- Fixed an issue where the Arc Segment and Endpoint Arc Segment tools in the Editor could create polygons with empty geometries.

**Components**:

- BUG-000183272: Fixed an issue with being unable to completely clear the Output Spatial Reference input with the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component UI.
- BUG-000183275: Fixed a link to the spatial reference documentation from the [Print](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-print/) component UI.
- Fixed an issue in the Chart component where the calendar heat chart did not respect the user’s system time zone.
- Fixed an issue where the [Popup](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/map-components/components/arcgis-popup/) remained open when clicking on the view element did not return any feature results.

#### 5.0.9 (03/04/2026) [509 03042026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#509-03042026)

**Core API**:

- BUG-000183154: Fixed an issue where the FeatureTable triggered multiple requests when the browser cache was disabled.
- [Esri Community - 1680182](https://community.esri.com/t5/arcgis-javascript-maps-sdk-questions/gif-is-not-animation-in-arcgis-js-api-5/m-p/1687845): Fixed an issue where PictureMarkerSymbols with GIFs were no longer animating by default.
- Fixed an issue where dragging and dropping columns in the FeatureTable caused rendering flicker.
- Fixed an issue where feature selection was possible in layers that were not currently visible on the map.

**Components**:

- Fixed an issue in the Chart component where calendar heat chart would sometimes render full null values upon data updates.
- Fixed an issue in the Chart component where calendar heat chart axis labels were not displaying correctly.

#### 5.0.8 (03/02/2026) [508 03022026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#508-03022026)

**Core API**:

- Fixed an intermittent rendering issue in VectorTileLayer where lines were not displaying in 3D.

**Components**:

- Bug fixes for charts components.
- Fixed an issue with the Utility Network Trace Analysis component where users could not run a trace when an edge object was used as the starting point in a map with SubtypeGroupLayers.

#### 5.0.7 (03/02/2026) [507 03022026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#507-03022026)

**Core API**:

- BUG-000183109: Fixed an issue where dashed lines with a value of 0 caused the VectorTileLayer to render incorrectly.
- BUG-000183112: Fixed an intermittent rendering issue in VectorTileLayer where lines were not displaying in 2D.
- BUG-000183132: Fixed a rendering issue that prevented fill outlines from displaying in VectorTileLayer.

**Components**:

- Fix for legacy Esri global icon font format.
- Bug fixes for charts components.
- Fixed an issue with the Utility Network Trace Analysis component where users could not run a trace when an edge object was used as the starting point in a map with FeatureLayers.
- Fixed an issue with Map Viewer that was causing trace configurations to not be saved on a map.

#### 5.0.6 (02/27/2026) [506 02272026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#506-02272026)

**Core API**:

- BUG-000173122: Fixed an issue where using the `refresh()` method on [ImageryTileLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/ImageryTileLayer/) was causing high memory usage.
- BUG-000183054: Fixed an issue where some CIM symbols with a thin geometry inside a tall frame were causing a crash.
- BUG-000183064: Fixed an issue where the Arcade Geometry function was failing with an error when using a basemap with a custom projection.
- Various fixes for Sketch and Editor.

**Components**:

- Updated translations and minor fixes for map components.

#### 5.0.5 (02/26/2026) [505 02262026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#505-02262026)

**Core API**:

- BUG-000183048: Fixed an issue where relative time queries were not working in some cases.
- Fixed a crash affecting the Swiss Topo Light Base Map.
- Fixed an issue in the Editor where the split line would not render correctly for polygon features
- Fixed an issue that could prevent SketchViewModel on-map visualization from rendering as expected.
- Fixed an issue where setting multipleSelectionEnabled on FeatureTable would not work correctly with layer change.
- Fixed an issue where default values for subtype sublayer would not set properly within the FeatureForm.

**Components**:

- Regression and bug fixes for charts components.
- Minor fixes for map components.
- Fixed an issue in the Utility Network Trace Analysis component where users were able to add SubnetLine features as trace locations.
- Fixed an issue in the Utility Network Trace Analysis component that allowed users to zoom to non-spatial objects.
- Fixed a bug where aggregated geometry graphics would disappear when selecting a feature in the results pane of the Utility Network Trace Analysis component
- Fixed an issue in the Utility Network Trace Analysis component where traces would fail if an edge object was used as a trace location.
- Fixed a bug that prevented users from selecting a new feature after an initial feature had been selected within the Utility Network Trace Analysis component.

#### 5.0.4 (02/25/2026) [504 02252026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#504-02252026)

**Core API**:

- Fixed an issue where interpolated style layers were not rendering correctly in [VectorTileLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/VectorTileLayer/).
- Fixed an issue where the symbol preview did not render curved geometries in the pending features in Editor.
- Fixed an issue where the `clear()` method was not working on Area Measurement and Distance Measurement components.

**Components**:

- Bug and regression fixes for charts, coding and map components.
- `arcgis-slider`: fixed focus issues and improved error handling when the `steps` property is 0 or negative

#### 5.0.3 (02/24/2026) [503 02242026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#503-02242026)

**Core API**:

- Fixed an issue where [FeatureReductionBinning](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/support/FeatureReductionBinning/) and [FeatureReductionClustering](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/support/FeatureReductionCluster/) was not being read from a web map.
- Enhanced the loading time for [PointCloudLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/PointCloudLayer/).

**Components**:

- Regression fixes for Charts and Map components.

#### 5.0.2 (02/23/2026) [502 02232026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#502-02232026)

**Core API**:

- Fixed issues with Sketch UI and updating point symbols.
- Fixed an issue where [VectorTileLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/VectorTileLayer/) point features were not displaying correctly.
- Enabled curve sketching to be on by default with the Editor in 2D.

**Components**:

- Minor fixes for Common and Map components.
- Minor fixes for beta components: AI components.

#### 5.0.1 (02/23/2026) [501 02232026 permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#501-02232026)

**Core API**:

- Fixed an issue with Google basemaps.
- Fixed an issue with snapping to point features.
- Fixed rendering issues with [SimpleMarkerSymbol](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/symbols/SimpleMarkerSymbol/).
- Fixed an issue with [VideoLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/VideoLayer/) and animation options.
- Fixed an issue with highlighting pixels in [ImageryLayer](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/references/core/layers/ImageryLayer/).

**Components**:

- Minor fixes for Charts and Map components.
- Fixes for beta components : Volume measurement and AI components.
- Updated translations/localization.

## Additional packages [additional packages permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#additional-packages)

Version 5.0 of the ArcGIS Maps SDK for JavaScript uses [ArcGIS Arcade 1.35](https://developers.arcgis.com/arcade/guide/release-notes/#version-1.35) (since 5.0).

Version 5.0 of the ArcGIS Maps SDK for JavaScript uses [Calcite Design System](https://developers.arcgis.com/calcite-design-system/), version [5.0.2](https://github.com/Esri/calcite-design-system/releases/tag/%40esri%2Fcalcite-components%405.0.2). In your application, we recommend using the same version or any minor version greater than `^5.0.2`.

## How to access the SDK [how to access the sdk permalink](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/release-notes/\#how-to-access-the-sdk)

- The API library is available on both CDN and npm, read more at [Get started](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/get-started/).
- For supported versions, you can also [download](https://developers.arcgis.com/javascript/latest/downloads/) both the documentation and the API library. These downloads are typically available 3-4 weeks after release.
